name: Alex Gilliam
bio: Alex Gilliam is a survivalist who appeared in {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026) on Discovery Channel. Public biographical details beyond his Season 19 cast credit are limited.

name: Ali Williams
bio: Ali Williams is a Raleigh, North Carolina-based wilderness guide and the founder of Wayfinder Outdoors, which leads wilderness classes and trips. She has been an outdoor educator and wilderness expedition leader since 2009, with experience including horsepacking in the Sierra Nevada and hiking Nepal's Annapurna circuit. She appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}.

name: Amanda Standley
bio: Amanda Standley is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026) on Discovery Channel. Publicly available biographical details about her background are limited.

name: Andrew Evans
bio: Andrew Evans is a self-described country guy from Tenaha in East Texas who works in the entertainment business. He grew up loving the outdoors, fishing, hiking, and learning survival basics from his family. Evans completed a 14-day challenge in eastern Zambia on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 alongside partner Nicole Pisani.

name: Andries Prinsloo
bio: Andries Prinsloo is a South African dangerous-game professional hunter and outfitter who operates Prinsloo Safaris in the KwaZulu-Natal and Limpopo provinces. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026), where in the episode {{ep:Ranger in Danger}} he attempted a 21-day challenge in a remote Thai jungle alongside a Texan wilderness guide.

name: Beau Martin
bio: Beau Martino is a climber, content creator, and self-described "professional dirtbag" who has been climbing since 2015 on routes across the Western United States, Canada, Southeast Asia, and South America. He quit his software job in 2019 and lived out of his vehicle from 2020 to 2023 while building an online following with comedic videos about climbing and dirtbag culture. He appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19.

name: Bob "Catfish" Rabon
bio: Bob "Catfish" Rabon is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026). Publicly available biographical details about his background beyond his cast credit and catfish-themed handle are limited.

name: Constance McCall
bio: Constance McCall is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026), including the episode {{ep:Savage Paradise}}, in which two superfans battled monsoon rains, poisonous fruit, and biting rats on a remote Thai island. Publicly available biographical details about her background are limited.

name: Danni Brianne
bio: Danni Brianne, also known as Dani Beau, is a New Jersey-born conservationist and lifelong vegetarian with certifications in wilderness exploration and search and rescue. She earned a master's degree in Iceland studying arctic invasive plant species and now works as an emergency management specialist in Maine while running her wilderness-themed Etsy shop, Arctic Pines. Brianne has competed in multiple {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} challenges in the Colombian jungle and Ecuadorian rainforest.

name: Dragonsky Shilletha Curtis
bio: Shilletha "Dragonsky" Curtis is a queer Black hiker, writer, and activist from New Jersey who thru-hiked the Appalachian Trail in 2021 and is pursuing the Triple Crown of long-distance hiking. Her debut articles and memoir have helped spark conversations about racism in the outdoors, and she appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026). Her work can be found at Summits and Spoons.

name: Holly Robertson
bio: Holly Robertson is a bushcraft expert and nomadic adventurer based in Byron Bay, Australia, and is described as the youngest person to run a survival school in the country. She teaches life-saving wilderness skills through immersive bush survival camps and lives off-grid in a vintage 1970s caravan as part of a commune-style community. She appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}.

name: Jena Ocean
bio: Jena Ocean is a Massachusetts-based storyteller, yoga teacher, and self-described "community witch" with a BA in Theology and Creative Writing, a 200-hour yoga teacher training, and a Reiki Master certification. She has self-published two poetry books, COLOR (2019) and SHE (2020), hosts the podcast Little Ritual, and runs global yoga and adventure retreats through Joyplay. She made her national television debut as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19.

name: Nicole Pisani
bio: Nicole Pisani is a Myrtle Beach, South Carolina hairstylist and owner of NikkiCole's Hair Design & Head Spa, which she opened in 2019. A mother of two with more than 12 years of styling experience, she has been voted Best Hairstylist by the Myrtle Beach Herald for five consecutive years. Pisani completed a 14-day challenge in Zambia on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 alongside partner Andrew Evans.

name: Pearson Caldwell
bio: Pearson Caldwell is the outdoorsman behind the Country Tactical (CoTac) social channels, which focus on hunting and tactical content, and he runs the outdoor brand Hardship Supply. He competed in {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19, where in the episode {{ep:Clash of the Survivalists}} a laid-back hunter and an opinionated adventure guide attempted a 21-day challenge in Zambia.

name: Perry Cornwell
bio: Perry Cornwell, known online as "Frontier Farmer," is a homesteader and survival content creator who shares foraging, shelter-building, and primitive-skills videos on social media. He competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19, in a challenge filmed in Thailand, and has said of the experience, "Surviving out there, I found to be pretty easy."

name: Tyler Dean Milligan
bio: Tyler Dean Milligan is a survival instructor, 10-year U.S. Army Infantry veteran (100% disabled), and human survival coach who teaches at The Survival University. He is also a published fiction author whose debut novel, State of Contempt: Ruination, has been praised for its dark, philosophical tone. He appeared on the docuseries The Garden: Commune or Cult and as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19.

name: Tyler Whitney
bio: Tyler Whitney (sometimes credited as Tyler Whitley) is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 19 (2026), including a challenge filmed in the Kalahari Desert. Publicly available biographical details about his background are limited.
